---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the TP_ETS2_Plugin
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., "The speedometer gauge stops updating when I attach a trailer.")

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open Touch Portal and go to page '...'
2. Start the game (ETS2 or ATS?)
3. Perform action '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots or a short video to help explain your problem.

**Your Environment (please complete the following information):**
 - **OS**: [e.g. Windows 10, Windows 11, macOS, Linux]
 - **Game**: [e.g. ETS2 or ATS]
 - **Game Version**: [e.g. 1.49, 1.50]
 - **Plugin Version**: [e.g. 5.1.9] *(Found in Touch Portal Settings -> Plugins)*
 - **Touch Portal Version**: [e.g. 3.2]

**Plugin Logs (Highly Recommended)**
Please attach the plugin log file if possible. You can find it here:
`%appdata%\TouchPortal\plugins\TP_ETS2_Plugin\logs\`
*(Drag and drop the `.log` file into this text box)*

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., "I am using the Gargamosch dashboard" or "I have OfflineMode enabled").
